article_meta.title: Venezuelan Political Crisis Trump declares 'Venezuelan regime' a foreign terrorist organization, orders oil tanker block

reasoning: Classification direction is reasonable (Lean Right) with appropriate confidence and structural evidence, but the response includes attribution-rule violations in both reasoning and key_indicators and was wrapped in markdown fences instead of raw JSON.
